title: Payments
summary: Utilizing Arcium's encrypted stack allows for confidential payments and highly secure thresholds/key management for wallets. This protects user balances and prevents the public tracing of sensitive financial transfers.
description: The Payments ecosystem built on Arcium.

bodySections.title: Why confidentiality matters in payments
bodySections.body: Payments reveal habits, balances, counterparties, and timing. Those signals are often too sensitive to expose by default, especially when users want financial utility without transparent surveillance.

bodySections.title: What to look for in Arcium-native payments
bodySections.body: Good payment examples show how confidentiality improves user safety, treasury operations, or wallet design without undermining the trust or usability of the final product.
